text.title: Multi-Agent Production Bus Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are drivers present (subtasks_independent, chain_shape, agent_count, audit_required)?

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND subtasks_independent == false AND chain_shape == 'linear'
drivers.valid == true AND subtasks_independent == false AND chain_shape == 'dependent_dag' or chain_shape == 'unknown'

conclusion.verdict: Pick hierarchical — planner + workers + synthesizer with traceable assignments.
